name: research_ethics_mutual_aid_request_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Research Ethics, the situation tagged internally around research ethics mutual aid request lumen tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Noah Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Noah Vasquez, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Research Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elena Mensah
agents.identity: I am Elena Mensah, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Research Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Noah Vasquez must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Noah Vasquez do?
